title: Internal error with packed arrays
body:
---


Author Name: **Byron Bradley** (@bbradley)
Original Redmine Issue: 176 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2009-11-04
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Commit 4c26792c9b06d49 (not in a release yet) caused a problem with packed arrays. The attached testcase fails with:
```
  %Error: Internal Error: t/t_multidim_packed.v:14: ../V3Ast.cpp:346: Adding list to non-list op1

```
The code causing the problem is:
```
  reg [3:0] [7:0] arr;

```
The test passes on the commit before 4c26792c9b06d49.
